# STATUS - blog publish gate

- Publish allowed: `NO`
- Post QA: `PENDING`

| Gate | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Draft completed | pending | post file must be final body only |
| Post QA | pending | run `npm run validate:posts` |
| Registry entry | pending | POSTING_REGISTRY.md row required |
| Publish allowed | not_allowed | final approval required |
